name: Time.Timestamp

unions.name: Message
unions.comment:
A wrapper for messages that might carry a timestamp. If it doesn't a command
is issued to get one that does and carries the same inner message.

aliases.name: Model
aliases.comment: Wraps the essential parts of another component.
aliases.type: { model : model, update : ( msg, Time ) -> model -> ( model, Cmd msg ), view : model -> Html msg, subscriptions : model -> Sub msg }

values.name: subscriptions
values.comment: The subscription for the wrapped component.

values.name: update
values.comment: Updates the inner model given a wrapped message.
values.type: Message msg -> Model msg model -> ( Model msg model, Cmd (Message msg) )
